name: Caramel-Apple Euphoria Dessert
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel, core, and cut each apple into 18 wedges; set aside.
2. Combine apple juice, caramel candies, vanilla, cardamom, and cinnamon in a crockpot.
3. Add peanut butter one teaspoon at a time over the ingredients in the crockpot.
4. Stir thoroughly to combine.
5. Add apple wedges; cover and cook on LOW for 5 hours.
6. Stir again before covering and cooking an additional hour on LOW.
7. Serve approximately 1/3 cup of warm mixture over a slice of angel food cake or ice cream.
